title: Problem with using stale auto-indexes created on materialized sub-selects within trigger programs
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK(age >= 0), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE orders (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, amount DOUBLE NOT NULL, order_date TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_order_timestamp() RETURNS VOID AS $$ BEGIN UPDATE orders SET order_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = NEW.id;
key_bug_features: Using stale auto-indexes in trigger programs
